message:
Add branch tests: normalizeLanguage fallback, normalizeModel sonnet-3.5, sanitizeValue default

- codeblock: normalizeLanguage unknown lang fallback (83.3%→100%, package 97.9%→99.0%)
- tokens: normalizeModel claude-3.5-sonnet variant (95.8%→100%, package 97.5%→98.7%)
- audit: sanitizeValue default case for int/float/bool/nil (91.7%→100%)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -240,6 +240,9 @@ func TestMultiModelContextLimits(t *testing.T) {
 		{"gemini-flash", 1000000},
 		{"gemini-ultra", 1000000},
 
+		// Claude with "3.5" variant
+		{"claude-3.5-sonnet", 200000},
+
 		// Unknown models fallback
 		{"unknown-model-123", 128000},
 		{"some-new-model", 128000},
